title: Cobble-Remodels
description: A resource pack that swaps official Cobblemon models with community remodels, changes vary from minor details to entire models.
body:
![Title Page](https://i.imgur.com/3ZaSCnf.png)

Features custom community made remodels to official cobblemon, all edits are made to make a model more accurate or visually appealing. No disrespect to modelers, all edits are subjective.

---

**Content:**

**Gible -** Moderate Edit of Original

**Gabite -** Slight Edit of Original

**Garchomp -** Extensive Edit of Original

**Gastly -** Moderate Edit of Original

**Haunter -** Extensive Edit of Original

**Gengar -** Moderate Edit of Original

**Slowpoke -** Slight Edit of Original (**Galarian Form -** New model)

**Slowbro -** Slight Edit of Original (**Galarian Form -** New model)

**Slowking -** Moderate Edit of Original (**Galarian Form -** New model)

**Mudkip -** Slight Edit of Original

**Marshtomp -** Slight Edit of Original

**Swampert -** Moderate Edit of Original

**Kangaskhan -** New Model

**Gligar -** Extreme Edit of Original

**Gliscor -** Moderate Edit of Original

**Incineroar -** Extreme Edit of Original

**Megamons Compatibility:**

**Mega Gengar -** New Model

**Mega Slowbro -** New Model

**Mega Kangaskhan -** New Model

**Mega Scizor -** New Model

**Mega Garchomp -** New Model

---

Thank you to Frank the Farmer, DiEn, and Kcin2001 on Discord for all their help with this project!


**Disclaimer:**

 This resource pack is an independent creation and is not affiliated with the Cobblemon team or the official Pokémon franchise. All rights and trademarks for Cobblemon and Pokémon are owned by their respective creators and organizations.

![End Page](https://i.imgur.com/KSxMqnF.png)
